name: Fetish Dungeon
description:
"You honestly think you have what It takes? Your nothing but a cushion to the massive ass of this dungeon, adventurer..."

You are an adventurer, who has heard rumors of an odd dungeon in a mountainside, which holds riches never seen before or claimed, and take it as an opportunity for easy success.

Of course, this is no ordinary quest. This Dungeon has a certain, spice to it. You will find yourself subjected to sights and experiences you never thought you would find in such a place. This is either your worst nightmare, or a dream come true depending on how things go for you.

[I wasn't satisfied with the dungeon bots out there, so I made my own. It has a little bit of everything, so go wild I guess. I finally added some extra images as well:]
